name: Shinobi
description: Sega's ninja action franchise centered on cinematic martial-arts combat, hostage rescues, and side-scrolling action. One of Sega's defining arcade-to-console action series.

eras.title: Arcade Origins
eras.description: The original arcade-style action games built around precise combat, hostage rescues, and stage-based ninja spectacle.

eras.title: Mega Drive Era
eras.description: The console-defining entries that turned Shinobi into one of Sega's signature action franchises.

eras.title: Modern Revival Era
eras.description: Later revivals and reinterpretations across newer hardware, with the series shifting between 3D action, handheld entries, and legacy revivals.
